error_patterns_sample: # - I/O error, disk error: lỗi đọc/ghi disk.
# - filesystem error, read-only file system: lỗi filesystem hoặc bị remount ro.
# - oom-killer: kernel kill process do thiếu RAM.
# - segfault: process crash do segmentation fault.
# - link is down: network link down.
# - authentication failure: lỗi đăng nhập/xác thực.
# - containerd, kubelet: lỗi runtime/Kubernetes node agent.

journalctl --since "24 hours ago" --no-pager  | grep -Ei 'I/O error|disk error|filesystem error|read-only file system|oom-killer|segfault|link is down|authentication failure|containerd|kubelet'  || true
# - I/O error, disk error: lỗi đọc/ghi disk.
# - filesystem error, read-only file system: lỗi filesystem hoặc bị remount ro.

name: Kiểm tra event log OS
next_actions: Kiem tra failed service bang systemctl --failed va xem journalctl cho cac loi kernel/error pattern.

result.status_label: WARNING - OS co event log/failed service can kiem tra
